allow: Bash(npx supabase@1 functions logs wa-send --project-ref jqmnmudfxxdcjfradvcj)
Bash(python3 scripts/search.py "messaging chat whatsapp ios dark minimal" --design-system -p "SlacZap")

Bash(node -e "import\(''@whiskeysockets/baileys''\).then\(m => { const keys = Object.keys\(m\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''socket''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''make''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''auth''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''fetch''\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''default''\)\).join\(''\\n''\)\) }\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Processos encerrados'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name; Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,Name,CommandLine | Where-Object {$_.CommandLine -like '*slac*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*tray*' -or $_.CommandLine -like '*3001*'}")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Host 'OK'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host done")

Bash(powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path '$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonLock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path '$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonCookie' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Lock removido'")
Bash(powershell -Command "Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5173 -InformationLevel Quiet; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5200 -InformationLevel Quiet")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5200 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Path")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Id \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess\) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Host 'Processos encerrados'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name electron -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\SLAC\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 800; Write-Host 'OK'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\SLAC\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'Limpo'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name electron -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Get-Process -Name 'SLAC WhatsApp' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\slac-whatsapp\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path \\"$env:APPDATA\\SLAC\\SingletonLock\\" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host 'OK'")
